values.name: summary
values.value: ={{ $('Scan Outcomes Folder').item.json.total + ' leads aged 3/7/14d without outcome' }}

values.name: counts
values.value: ={{ { d3: $('Scan Outcomes Folder').item.json.buckets.day3.length, d7: $('Scan Outcomes Folder').item.json.buckets.day7.length, d14: $('Scan Outcomes Folder').item.json.buckets.day14.length, scanned: $('Scan Outcomes Folder').item.json.scanned, resolved: $('Scan Outcomes Folder').item.json.resolved } }}

_readme.description: Daily 10am. Scans Agent Runs/ last 21 days for lead IDs, excludes ones in Outcomes/. Buckets 3/7/14d. POSTs /api/chase-check. Logs via 04.
